pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which explicitly query and modify the 'create-c' permission ID through the Rocket.Chat REST API.
Verified via verifier.py logic which enforces the condition 'user' not in current_roles to pass the primary goal.
Verified via verifier.py logic which enforces the condition 'admin' in current_roles as a safety check.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires modifying a synthetically configured Rocket.Chat instance. The target permission ID 'create-c' is hardcoded in the setup and export scripts that interface with the REST API. The verifier strictly enforces the removal of the 'user' role from this permission and the retention of the 'admin' role, while functionally verifying that regular users can no longer create channels.
